semantic.role: Core pipeline state manager: initializes, mutates, and queries the mutable TaskContext for pipeline execution
responsibilities: Factory creation of initial TaskArtifactsState, TaskTelemetryState, and composite TaskState objects
Resetting pipeline state within a TaskContext with optional partial overrides
Tracking LLM usage metrics (token consumption, cost) into telemetry
Recording per-stage runtime metrics (duration, heap, RSS) for diagnostics and profiling
Maintaining monotonic counters for processed, skipped, and failed files
Caching file skeletons and unsupported-file markers in runtime-scoped artifacts
Queuing pending index commits (file hash, kind, and SpineUnit) for batch flush
Collecting drift warnings, summarize diagnostics, and validate diagnostics in telemetry
Providing lookup queries for cached skeletons and unsupported-file checks
outOfScope: Persisting task state to disk or database
Performing file I/O or filesystem operations
Defining pipeline stage contracts or stage ordering
invariants: All task-state factory functions produce valid fully-initialized state objects with non-null collections
All state mutations operate exclusively through a TaskContext reference, never on detached state
File-path keys in runtime-cache Maps (skeletons, unsupportedFiles, pendingCommits) are always relative paths
Drift warnings and diagnostic snapshots are append-only collections
Core module must not import or depend on CLI entry code (core-pipeline-isolation rule)

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, mutable state abstraction that pipeline stages and task runners use to record progress, cache derived artifacts, and collect telemetry without coupling directly to each other's internals.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era

publicSurface.description: Creates and returns a fresh TaskArtifactsState with empty skeleton, unsupported-files, and pending-commit maps. Called at the start of a pipeline run.
Creates and returns a fresh TaskTelemetryState initialized with the given diagnostics mode and zeroed counters. Called at the start of a pipeline run.
Creates and returns a complete TaskState by composing createTaskArtifactsState and createTaskTelemetryState with default values. Called when initializing a new TaskContext.
Resets the TaskContext state to a fresh baseline, preserving only the diagnostics mode and applying optional partial overrides. Called when re-initializing the pipeline for a new run.
Records LLM usage information (token counts, cost) into the task telemetry. Called by LLM-invoking stages after each model call.
Records a runtime metric snapshot (duration, heap, RSS) for a named pipeline stage. Called by each stage upon completion.
Increments the processed-file counter in telemetry stats. Called by stages after successfully handling a file.
Increments the skipped-file counter in telemetry stats. Called by stages when a file is intentionally skipped.
Increments the failed-file counter in telemetry stats. Called by stages when a file processing fails.
Marks a file path as unsupported with a human-readable reason in the runtime artifacts cache. Called by analyzers that cannot parse a file.
Checks whether a given file path has been previously marked as unsupported. Called by stages before attempting to process a file.
Stores a parsed FileSkeleton object in the runtime artifacts cache keyed by file path. Called by the AST extraction stage.
Retrieves a cached FileSkeleton by file path, or undefined if none exists. Called by stages that need file structure data.
Queues a pending commit record (hash, file kind, spine unit) for batch persistence. Called after a file is fully processed and needs indexing.
Appends a drift-warning entry containing file path and reason to the telemetry drift-warnings list. Called by the semantic-drift detection stage.
Pushes a diagnostic snapshot into the summarize diagnostics array within telemetry. Called by the summarization stage for observability.
Pushes a diagnostic snapshot into the validate diagnostics array within telemetry. Called by the validation stage for observability.

exports.name: recordTaskStageMetric
setUnsupportedTaskFile
exports.signature:
setUnsupportedTaskFile(
  context: TaskContext,
  filePath: string,
  reason: string,
)

exports.name: setTaskSkeleton
exports.signature:
setTaskSkeleton(
  context: TaskContext,
  filePath: string,

)

exports.signature:
queueTaskCommit(
  context: TaskContext,
  filePath: string,

)

exports.name: addTaskDriftWarning
exports.signature:
addTaskDriftWarning(
  context: TaskContext,
  warning: { filePath: string; reason: string },
